A

actualizarEstado(String) - Method in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.controller.SudokuController
Updates the status label shown at the bottom of the window.
AdaptadorFocoFiltro - Class in com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.controller.handlers
Adapter class that filters keyboard input to allow only digits between 1 and 6, and standard editing keys (backspace and delete).
AdaptadorFocoFiltro() - Constructor for class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.controller.handlers.AdaptadorFocoFiltro
 
agregarClaseUnica(Label, String) - Static method in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.view.FabricaEstilos
Adds a CSS class to a JavaFX label only if it is not already present.
agregarClaseUnica(TextField, String) - Static method in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.view.FabricaEstilos
Adds a CSS class to a JavaFX node only if it is not already present.
alCambiarCelda(int, int, int) - Method in interface com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.controller.handlers.EscuchadorCambioCelda
Invoked when a cell's value changes due to user input.
alCambiarCelda(int, int, int) - Method in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.controller.SudokuController
Invoked when a cell's value changes due to user input.
aleatorio - Variable in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.model.GeneradorSudoku
Random number generator used throughout the generation process.
aleatorio - Variable in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.model.ProveedorAyuda
Random source used to pick an empty cell and a candidate value.
ALTO_VENTANA - Static variable in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.Main
Default height of the main window, in pixels.
ANCHO_VENTANA - Static variable in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.Main
Default width of the main window, in pixels.
aplicarBordesBloque(TextField, boolean, boolean) - Static method in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.view.FabricaEstilos
Applies the appropriate block-border style to a cell based on its position within the 6x6 grid.
aplicarEstadoError(String) - Method in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.controller.SudokuController
Updates the status label with an error message and applies the error style through the FabricaEstilos.
aplicarEstadoError(Label) - Static method in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.view.FabricaEstilos
Applies the error style to the status label and removes the success style if present.
aplicarEstadoExito(String) - Method in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.controller.SudokuController
Updates the status label with a success message and applies the success style through the FabricaEstilos.
aplicarEstadoExito(Label) - Static method in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.view.FabricaEstilos
Applies the success style to the status label and removes the error style if present.
aplicarEstiloCeldaFija(TextField) - Static method in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.view.FabricaEstilos
Applies the "fixed cell" visual style to the given text field.
aplicarEstiloError(TextField, boolean) - Static method in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.view.FabricaEstilos
Toggles the error style on the given text field.
aplicarEstiloSugerencia(TextField) - Static method in class com.example.miniproyectosudoku6x6.view.FabricaEstilos
Applies the "hint suggestion" visual style to a cell, highlighting it in orange.
